data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Procurement planning can be enhanced by using  combination of SAP IBP and SAP SAC that integrates demand forecasting, supplier management, and inventory optimization. SAP IBP helps ADNOC forecast material needs, optimize procurement schedules, and manage supplier collaboration in real-time. SAP SAC provides advanced analytics and visualization, enabling data-driven decisions by tracking procurement KPIs, trends, and cost efficiencies. Together, these platforms enhance ADNOC’s procurement agility, reduce lead times, and improve supplier performance, ensuring seamless supply chain management for critical operations

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: For procurement budgeting, SAP tools such as SAP BPC (Business Planning and Consolidation) facilitate comprehensive budgeting and forecasting, aligning procurement expenses with financial plans. SAP Funds Management (FM) ensures that budgets are tracked and controlled, preventing overspending by managing fund allocations. SAP S/4HANA Controlling (CO) provides detailed cost tracking and budget adherence. Additionally, SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) offers advanced analytics and visualization to monitor and analyze procurement spending effectively, supporting data-driven decision-making. The funds availability control can be made available with budget tolerances at PO / Contract processing level. Warning  Error messages and further processing can be configured as per the business requirements and tolerances configured in the system

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: To set up Procurement Performance Management, ADNOC has to start by defining key performance indicators (KPIs) such as cost savings, supplier performance, and compliance rates, financial metrics, procurement speed (Days from Requisition to Goods Receipt) etc. Once the KPIs are established, same can be implemented in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) for real-time dashboards and reporting. Use SAP Ariba or SAP S/4HANA to track procurement activities, automate data collection, and analyze performance metrics. Integrate SAP BusinessObjects for in-depth analytics. Relevant ADNOC stakeholders can then regularly review performance data, set targets, and adjust strategies based on insights to enhance efficiency and drive continuous improvement in procurement processes.

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Procurement capabilities development is a procurement department operating model topic and is dependent on defining clear roles, responsibilities, and governance structures aligned with strategic procurement goals. Upskilling and skills acquisition can then be targeted based on the required skill, capacity and capability manpower model. SAP Ariba and SAP S4 for can then be used for automation, spend analysis, and supplier collaboration. Regular performance reviews and continuous improvement initiatives ensure the procurement team remains agile, innovative, and aligned with organizational objectives

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: The procurement strategy is a comprehensive plan that outlines how an organization will acquire the goods and services it needs to achieve its business objectives. Automating procurement strategy in SAP involves streamlining processes such as purchase requisition and order creation, integrating with SAP Ariba for supplier collaboration, and leveraging automated sourcing, bidding, and contract management. Additionally, automated inventory and demand management, reporting, and compliance controls enhance efficiency and accuracy. By integrating with other SAP modules, organizations can achieve a seamless procurement process that supports overall business objectives and operational excellence. In ADNOC's context it is imperative that this process is re-engineered based on categorization of materials. The product categorization should be multi dimensional and each category should be assigned to a sourcing strategy on how to procure (e.g. auto procurement on re-order point basis, MRP based procurement, RFP based procurement, periodic procurement etc). Once the category and sourcing is streamlined, the same can then be adopted in SAP Ariba / SAP S4 / SAP SAC

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Procurement Health Check  involves assessing the efficiency and effectiveness of procurement processes using key performance indicators (KPIs) and analytics. It includes evaluating spend management, supplier performance, contract compliance, and process automation. Tools like SAP Ariba and SAP S/4HANA provide real-time data on procurement activities, while SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) enables in-depth analysis of procurement KPIs such as cost savings, supplier lead times, and purchase order cycles. ADNOC will be required to establish the health check parameters which can then be adopted in SAP SAC or any other visual tool

data.record_status: Approval in Progress - Digital VP Sign-off
data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Procurement Quality Assessment through is linked to health checks and requires to  evaluate the accuracy, compliance, and effectiveness of procurement processes. SAP S/4HANA and SAP Ariba, ADNOC can track key quality metrics such as on-time delivery, defect rates, and supplier performance. SAP QM integrates with procurement to monitor material quality during the procurement process.  SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) provides dashboards and reports for analyzing quality-related KPIs, enabling data-driven decisions.

data.record_status: Approval in Progress - Digital VP Sign-off
data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Procurement risk management involves identifying, assessing, and mitigating risks associated with procurement activities to ensure smooth operations and supply chain continuity. Key risks include supplier failure, price volatility, legal non-compliance, and geopolitical issues. To manage these, ADNOC need to implement strategies such as supplier diversification, long-term contracts, and risk assessments. SAP Ariba Supplier Risk enable real-time risk monitoring by providing insights into supplier performance, financial stability, and compliance. Additionally, contingency planning, risk-sharing contracts, and regular audits help mitigate procurement risks, ensuring that procurement activities remain aligned with business goals and minimize disruptions to the supply chain. However all risk parameters need to be defined by ADNOC and once parameters are established the same can then be adopted in SAP

data.record_status: Approval in Progress - Digital VP Sign-off
data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: This is a Inventory strategy topic, and defers to the strategic optimization of inventory management processes to achieve high efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and alignment with business goals. It involves maintaining the right balance of stock levels, ensuring timely replenishment, reducing excess inventory, and minimizing stockouts. Inventory excellence focuses on enhancing visibility, accuracy, and control over the supply chain, through real-time tracking, data analytics, and automation which can be built-in SAP SAC through SAP solution components (S4, Ariba, GTT) and interfacing with real time material tracking tools.

data.record_status: Approval in Progress - Digital VP Sign-off
data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Monitoring and control of inventory items in ADNOC involve accurate tracking, management, and optimization of inventory across its operations. Standard SAP objects like SAP IM, SAP WM/EWM can provide real time information to monitor stock levels, track movements, and automate replenishment processes. ADNOC can enhance the process by deploying real-time data and analytics to oversee inventory levels, minimizing stockouts or overstocking. Overall process requires regular audits, inspections, and quality checks are conducted to ensure compliance with safety and operational standards, these processes can be configured in SAP S4 solution

data.record_status: Approval in Progress - Digital VP Sign-off
data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Compliance Control and Monitoring in procurement management through SAP involves ensuring that procurement processes adhere to regulatory requirements, organizational policies, and contractual obligations. SAP S4 provides standard functionalities to support compliance and monitoring throughout the procurement cycle. The compliance management is dependent on the compliance data which is captured for contracts, shipping processes and materials/products. Once the right compliance data is captured, SAP features like document management, event management etc. can be used to automate compliance controls

data.record_status: Approval in Progress - Digital VP Sign-off

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Supplier registration enabled by Ariba involves a streamlined process where vendors create a profile on the Ariba Network to connect with buyers like ADNOC. Suppliers input key business information, including certifications, product offerings, and contact details, to qualify for sourcing events or procurement opportunities. The registration process may also involve submitting compliance documents, agreeing to terms, and completing questionnaires. Once registered, suppliers can receive requests for proposals (RFPs), participate in bids, and manage orders, invoices, and contracts through the Ariba platform. ADNOC can setup localized supplier registration data requirements as per their procurement policies and regulatory requirements (ICV) etc.

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Supplier pre-qualification through Ariba can evaluate potential vendors to ensure they meet specific criteria before being selected for procurement activities. Either based on a supplier registration details or through suppliers completing a detailed questionnaire covering aspects such as financial stability, compliance with industry standards, quality certifications, and previous performance; right suppliers' can be pre-qualified for an RFP process. Ariba automates this process, enabling buyers to review and score responses based on predefined criteria. The system helps streamline supplier evaluation, reduces risk, and ensures that only qualified suppliers are invited to participate in tenders and procurement processes

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Demand analysis for category management in procurement requires evaluating and forecasting the needs for a specific category of goods or services. It includes collecting historical purchase data, predicting future demand using statistical methods, and segmenting categories for more precise insights. Engaging with stakeholders and analyzing market trends further refines understanding. This analysis supports effective inventory management, optimizes procurement strategies, and improves supplier relationships, ensuring that procurement decisions align with anticipated needs and strategic goals. Required information for demand analysis can be extracted through customized and integrated reports from SAP Ariba and S4

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Market analysis involves external factors that influence the supply and demand dynamics of a specific procurement category. This includes evaluating market trends, pricing fluctuations, and supplier landscapes to understand current and future market conditions. By analyzing global competitor activities, technological advancements, and economic indicators, ADNOC can identify opportunities for cost savings and risk mitigation. Market analysis also helps in identifying potential suppliers, negotiating better terms, and ensuring supply chain resilience. This is largely a manual process and localized algos are required for conducting market research however ADNOC requires subscriptions for gathering the right information which then can be analyzed through ADNOC's localized alogos

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Category strategy formation involves developing a comprehensive plan for managing and optimizing procurement activities within a specific category. This includes analyzing market trends, supplier capabilities, and internal needs to create a strategic approach for sourcing and purchasing.

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Regular refreshes of the category spendmap ensure that data on expenditures is up-to-date, providing insights into spending patterns and opportunities for cost savings. Once the categories are established customized reports and dashboards can be setup in SAP SAC (integrated with SAP S4 and Ariba) in addition SAP Spend Control Tower can be implemented to monitor and refresh Spend Analysis for updating the category spendmaps

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Category agreement monitoring involves tracking the performance and compliance of supplier agreements to ensure that terms are met, and value is delivered. Once the categories are established customized reports and dashboards can be setup in SAP SAC (integrated with SAP S4 and Ariba)

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Procurement KPIs for supplier analysis and periodic reporting should be objective, measurable, and free from subjectivity. A uniform policy must be established across procurement categories and supplier groups to ensure consistency. These KPIs will facilitate performance monitoring and enable standardized reporting. Once defined, the KPIs can be integrated into SAP S/4HANA and BI-BW systems for visualization through dashboards and reports. This approach ensures transparency, allowing stakeholders to track supplier performance against clearly defined criteria and make data-driven decisions across the supply chain

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Should be reengineered and new tools considered
data.5_3_target_recommendation_remark_explana: Supplier development refers to the training and development of suppliers to ensure they meet ADNOC standards and compliance requirements. This allows to deliver training programs, certifications, and compliance courses directly within the learning platform. Suppliers can access learning materials, complete training modules, and track their progress through interactive dashboards. The system supports customized content tailored to specific supplier needs and industry regulations. Automated notifications and reminders help ensure timely completion of required training. SAP LMS / Ariba Portal solutions can be integrated and used to manage supplier development programs

data.2_8_business_recommendation_for_automati: Existing IT/Digital tools should be enhanced
data.3_7_key_manual_steps_optional: The documents and evidence that suppliers submit during registration and pre-qualification are validated manually by downloading from Ariba
